legacySingleShot.boundary: Older single-shot ranges are archival context only and are not the launch claim.

primary.baseline: same agent without the lean-code ruleset
primary.label: Synthetic Lean Gain public benchmark
primary.method: paired public fixture tasks with and without the lean-code ruleset

evidenceRoutes.answers: Which repo surfaces may be deleted, simplified, kept, or proof-blocked?
evidenceRoutes.nonClaim: Do not treat audit findings as benchmark savings.
evidenceRoutes.proofBoundary: Source-scan evidence only; it does not prove line, token, cost, or time savings.

evidenceRoutes.answers: Which current-diff changes can be deleted, simplified, kept, or proof-blocked before merge?
evidenceRoutes.nonClaim: Do not treat a smaller diff as measured token, cost, or time savings without a matched baseline.
evidenceRoutes.proofBoundary: Diff-scoped evidence only; it does not prove whole-repo or benchmark savings.

evidenceRoutes.answers: Which intentional shortcuts have ceilings, upgrade triggers, and missing-trigger debt?
evidenceRoutes.nonClaim: Do not present shortcut counts as code-size savings.
evidenceRoutes.proofBoundary: Shortcut-ledger evidence only; it does not prove benchmark or per-repo savings.

currentRepoBoundary.reason: There is no untreated baseline for this repository; ShipGuard cannot subtract code, cost, or time that was never produced.

expectedAssertions: report-quality preserves the Lean Gain current-repo routing question in JSON and Markdown
the fixture exposes currentRepoBoundary.evidenceRoutes for lean-audit, lean-review, and lean-debt
each route has a command, expected artifact, answer, proof boundary, and non-claim
the Markdown exposes Current Repo Evidence Routes with the exact Lean commands
the fixture keeps benchmark direction separate from current-repo savings claims
the fixture keeps scopeBoundary.shipguardOnly and targetAppsReadOnly explicit
shareable output contains no local absolute paths or private app identifiers
fixtureCandidate.privateDataPolicy: This promoted fixture is synthetic. Use source reports only to choose report shape; do not copy private app code, local paths, screenshots, app-specific identifiers, or proprietary text.
fixtureCandidate.sourceQuestion: Does it route current-repo evidence back to lean audit, lean review, and lean debt?

leanDebtLedger.description: Synthetic shortcut ledger for Lean Gain routing coverage.

nextActions: Use shipguard lean audit for cuttable repo surfaces.
Use shipguard lean review on the active diff before merge.
Use shipguard lean debt to count intentional shortcuts with ceilings and upgrade triggers.
Do not claim per-repo line, token, cost, or time savings unless you have a real matched baseline.
reportQualityQuestions: Does it route current-repo evidence back to lean audit, lean review, and lean debt?

scanScope.note: Synthetic fixture; no private source tree was scanned.

scopeBoundary.purpose: Synthetic public fixture for ShipGuard report-quality behavior.

sourceInfluence.boundary: ShipGuard reports benchmark direction honestly and implements its own native reports. It does not vendor external code.
sourceInfluence.name: Lean code benchmark influence
